ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Booking #98765
ham.body:
Dear Priya, 

Thank you for choosing Skyways Airlines. Below are the details of your upcoming flight:

Booking Reference: 98765
Passenger: Priya Sharma
Flight: SW123
Departure: 15th July 2026, 09:30 AM
From: Delhi (DEL)
To: Mumbai (BOM)
Gate: 14B
Seat: 12A

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For any changes or assistance, contact us at support@skyways.com.

We wish you a pleasant journey.

Warm regards,
Skyways Airlines Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required for Your Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Employee, 

This is the HR department notifying you of a critical update required for your payroll account. Our records indicate a discrepancy in your bank details that must be verified within 24 hours to ensure uninterrupted salary disbursement.

Please click the link below to confirm your updated bank information:
<URL>

Failure to act will result in temporary suspension of your salary until the issue is resolved. This measure is in compliance with the latest company payroll policy and government regulations.

If you have already updated your details, please disregard this message. For any queries, contact the HR helpdesk at hrhelp@company.com.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Regards,
HR Manager, Company
